# zstack_global_configs (Data Source)

Query ZStack global configuration keys and values. Use this data source to discover valid category/name pairs before managing a `zstack_global_config` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zstack_global_configs" "vm_deletion_policy" {
  category = "vm"
  name     = "deletionPolicy"
}

output "vm_deletion_policy" {
  value = data.zstack_global_configs.vm_deletion_policy.global_configs[0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `category` (String) Exact global config category to query.
- `name` (String) Exact global config name to query. Mutually exclusive with `name_pattern`.
- `name_pattern` (String) Pattern for fuzzy matching global config names. Use % for multiple characters and _ for exactly one character. Mutually exclusive with `name`.

### Read-Only

- `global_configs` (List of Object) List of matched global configs.
